focus: Final synthesis prep: ensure all 6 axes have >=1 finding, all findings tagged + cited + with follow-on packet. Flag any thin-evidence axis.

graphEvents.label: Final synthesis coverage across six SPAR comparison axes
Strict-validation baseline prerequisite for template packets

label: Adopt blocker-vs-refinement question budget as Required To Proceed vs Optional Refinements
Add SPAR-style phase-boundary copy above the internal command set
Use four-axis command taxonomy instead of two-axis command collapse
Build declarative ownership manifest as inventory and lint before mutation
Add operator-visible diagnostic tool ledger
Classify template roles before any manifest execution
Prototype runtime target manifests after ownership semantics
Use SPAR personas as evaluation fixtures and audience maps
Reject static tools.yaml as routing authority
Reject hard global instruction-file line caps; adapt generated-block budgets
Reject named SPAR personas inside runtime prompts
Reject two-template consumer architecture; keep source-layer compression only
Installer axis covered by ownership and runtime-target findings
Instruction-file axis covered by ownership manifest and generated-block budget findings
Command granularity axis covered by phase-boundary copy and command taxonomy findings
Template architecture axis covered by inventory manifest and compression-boundary findings
Tool discovery axis covered by diagnostic ledger and authority-boundary findings
Persona and tone axis covered by question budget, persona fixtures, and runtime persona boundary findings
SPAR lifecycle language can improve navigation copy but must not replace system-spec-kit command semantics
Static local inventories are diagnostic unless reconciled with live hooks and MCP schemas
Template source compression must preserve validation-critical consumer artifacts

direction: Collapse system-spec-kit commands into SPAR's four phase skills
reason: Internal commands encode separate execution mode, feature flags, lifecycle intent, and executor/provenance contracts.

direction: Use tools.yaml as routing source of truth
reason: Internal capability truth is dynamic across Skill Advisor hooks, MCP schemas, Code Mode discovery, and runtime-exposed tools.

direction: Delete consumer spec artifacts to mimic SPAR's two-template model
reason: Strict validation, phase-parent detection, graph metadata, continuity, and completion gates require richer consumer artifacts.
